ContactFamilyVariableSynchronizer.cc
1 // -*- tab-width: 2; indent-tabs-mode: nil; coding: utf-8-with-signature -*-

7 /* Author : encheryg at Tue Apr 12 17:12:12 2016
8  * Generated by createNew
9  */
10 
11 #include <ArcGeoSim/Mesh/SurfaceUtils/ContactFamily.h>
12 #include <ArcGeoSim/Utils/VMap.h>
13 
14 #include "ContactFamilyVariableSynchronizer.h"
15 
16 // S'inspire de VariableSynchronizer
17 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
18 Arcane::Int64 ContactFamilyVariableSynchronizer::
19 _form_unique_id(const ContactInternal & contact) const
20 {
21  const Arcane::Integer integer_size = 29;
22  const Arcane::Int64 integer_mask = (Arcane::Int64(1)<<integer_size)-1 ;
23 
24  const Arcane::Item item_1(contact.item1Internal());
25  const Arcane::Item item_2(contact.item2Internal());
26 
27  if (item_1.null())
28  {
29  ARCANE_ASSERT((not item_2.null()),("Inconsistent (null,null) contact"));
30  const Arcane::Int64 item_2_uid = item_2.uniqueId();
31  ARCANE_ASSERT(((item_2_uid & ~integer_mask) == 0 and item_2_uid < integer_mask),("Too large item2 unique id %d", item_2_uid));
32  return item_2_uid << integer_size | integer_mask;
33  }
34  else
35  {
36  const Arcane::Int64 item_1_uid = item_1.uniqueId();
37  ARCANE_ASSERT(((item_1_uid & ~integer_mask) == 0 and item_1_uid < integer_mask),("Too large item1 unique id %d", item_1_uid));
38 
39  if (item_2.null())
40  {
41  return integer_mask << integer_size | item_1_uid;
42  }
43  else
44  {
45  const Arcane::Int64 item_2_uid = item_2.uniqueId();
46  ARCANE_ASSERT(((item_2_uid & ~integer_mask and item_2_uid < integer_mask) == 0),("Too large item2 unique id %d", item_2_uid));
47  return item_2_uid << integer_size | item_1_uid;
48  }
49  }
50 }
51 
52 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
53 void
54 ContactFamilyVariableSynchronizer::
55 _uniqueIdToLocalId(Arcane::Int32ArrayView localIds, Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView uniqueIds) const
56 {
57  ARCANE_ASSERT((localIds.size() == uniqueIds.size()),("Incompatible array argument sizes"));
58 
59  const Arcane::Integer family_size = m_contactGroup.family() -> maxLocalId();
60  ArcGeoSim::VMap<Int64, Int32> uid_to_lid_map(family_size);
61 
62  const ContactInternal * internals = m_contactGroup.family() -> contactsInternal();
63  for(Arcane::Integer i=0;i<family_size;++i)
64  {
65  const Arcane::Int64 uid = _form_unique_id(internals[i]);
66  const Arcane::Int32 lid = i;
67  uid_to_lid_map[uid] = lid;
68  }
69 
70  const Arcane::Integer sample_size = uniqueIds.size();
71  for(Arcane::Integer i=0;i<sample_size;++i)
72  {
73  ArcGeoSim::VMap<Int64, Int32>::const_iterator finder = uid_to_lid_map.find(uniqueIds[i]);
74  if (finder == uid_to_lid_map.end())
75  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, "Cannot find contact uid");
76  localIds[i] = finder.value();
77  }
78 }
79 
80 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
81 void
82 ContactFamilyVariableSynchronizer::
83 _checkValid(Arcane::ArrayView<GhostRankInfo> ghost_rank_info,
84  Arcane::ArrayView<ShareRankInfo> share_rank_info)
85 {
86  Arcane::Integer nb_comm_proc = ghost_rank_info.size();
87  Arcane::Integer nb_error = 0;
88  bool has_error = false;
89  const Arcane::Integer max_error = 10;
90  Arcane::Int32 my_rank = m_parallelMng->commRank();
91  IContactFamily* contactFamily = m_contactGroup.family() ;
92  ContactInternal* contactsInternal = contactFamily -> contactsInternal() ;
93 
94  Arcane::SharedArray<bool> marked_elem(contactFamily -> maxLocalId());
95  marked_elem.fill(false);
96  ENUMERATE_CONTACT(i, m_contactGroup){
97  const Contact contact = *i;
98  if(contact.isOwn()) {
99  marked_elem[contact.localId()] = true;
100  }
101  }
102 
103  for(Arcane::Integer i_comm=0; i_comm<nb_comm_proc; ++i_comm ){
104  GhostRankInfo& ghost_info = ghost_rank_info[i_comm];
105  ShareRankInfo& share_info = share_rank_info[i_comm];
106  if (ghost_info.rank()!=share_info.rank()){
107  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, Arcane::String::format("Inconsistency between the subdomain numbers")) ;
108  }
109  Arcane::Integer current_proc = ghost_info.rank();
110  Arcane::Int32ConstArrayView ghost_grp = ghost_info.localIds();
111  Arcane::Int32ConstArrayView share_grp = share_info.localIds();
112 
113  if(share_grp.empty() && ghost_grp.empty()){
114  has_error = true;
115  continue;
116  }
117  if(current_proc==my_rank){
118  has_error = true;
119  continue;
120  }
121 
122  for(Arcane::Integer z=0, zs=ghost_grp.size(); z<zs; ++z ){
123  const ContactInternal ci = contactsInternal[ghost_grp[z]];
124  bool is_marked = marked_elem[ci.localId()];
125  if(is_marked){
126  if (nb_error<max_error)
127  ++nb_error;
128  continue;
129  }
130  marked_elem[ci.localId()] = true;
131  }
132 
133  bool is_send_first = current_proc < my_rank;
134  m_sync_list.add( VariableSyncInfo (share_grp,ghost_grp,current_proc,is_send_first) );
135  }
136 
137  ENUMERATE_CONTACT(i, m_contactGroup){
138  const Contact contact = *i;
139  if(!marked_elem[contact.localId()]){
140  ++nb_error;
141  }
142  }
143 
144  if(nb_error!=0){
145  has_error = true;
146  }
147  if(has_error)
148  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, Arcane::String::format("Fatal error while creating the exchange structures of the contact family"));
149 }
150 
151 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
152 void ContactFamilyVariableSynchronizer::compute() {
153  Arcane::Integer my_rank = m_parallelMng -> commRank() ;
154  Arcane::Integer nb_rank = m_parallelMng -> commSize() ;
155 
156  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::Int32SharedArray> boundary_items(nb_rank) ;
157 
158  ENUMERATE_CONTACT(i, m_contactGroup){
159  Arcane::Integer owner = i -> owner() ;
160  if(owner == my_rank)
161  continue ;
162  boundary_items[owner].add(i -> localId()) ;
163  }
164 
165  m_sync_list.clear() ;
166 
167  m_communicating_ranks.clear() ;
168  Arcane::Int32SharedArray communicating_ghost_ranks ;
169  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0 ; i < nb_rank ; ++i){
170  if(boundary_items[i].empty())
171  continue ;
172  communicating_ghost_ranks.add(i) ;
173  }
174 
175  Arcane::Integer nb_comm_rank = communicating_ghost_ranks.size() ;
176 
177  Arcane::Int32SharedArray nb_ghost(nb_rank) ;
178  Arcane::Int32SharedArray nb_share(nb_rank) ;
179  nb_ghost.fill(0) ;
180 
181  Arcane::Integer max_comm_rank = m_parallelMng -> reduce(Arcane::Parallel::ReduceMax, nb_comm_rank) ;
182 
183  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::Int32SharedArray> ghost_group_list(boundary_items.size()) ;
184 
185  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0 ; i < nb_comm_rank ; ++i){
186  Arcane::Int32 current_rank = communicating_ghost_ranks[i] ;
187  Arcane::Int32SharedArray ghost_grp = boundary_items[current_rank] ;
188  ghost_group_list[i] = ghost_grp ;
189  nb_ghost[current_rank] = ghost_grp.size() ;
190  }
191 
192  Arcane::SharedArray<ShareRankInfo> share_rank_info ;
193  Arcane::SharedArray<GhostRankInfo> ghost_rank_info;
194  {
195  Arcane::Integer gather_size = 1+(max_comm_rank*2) ;
196  Arcane::Int32SharedArray global_ghost_info(gather_size*nb_rank) ;
197  {
198  Arcane::Int32SharedArray local_ghost_info(gather_size);
199  Arcane::Integer pos = 0;
200  local_ghost_info[pos++] = nb_comm_rank;
201 
202  for(Arcane::Integer index = 0, s = communicating_ghost_ranks.size(); index<s; ++index ){
203  local_ghost_info[pos++] = communicating_ghost_ranks[index];
204  local_ghost_info[pos++] = ghost_group_list[index].size();
205  }
206 
207  m_parallelMng -> allGather(local_ghost_info,global_ghost_info);
208  }
209  {
210  for(Arcane::Integer index=0, s=nb_rank; index<s; ++index ){
211  Arcane::Integer pos = gather_size*index;
212  Arcane::Integer sub_size = global_ghost_info[pos++];
213  for(Arcane::Integer sub_index=0; sub_index<sub_size; ++sub_index ){
214  Arcane::Integer proc_id = global_ghost_info[pos++];
215  Arcane::Integer nb_elem = global_ghost_info[pos++];
216  if (proc_id==my_rank){
217  share_rank_info.add(ShareRankInfo(index,nb_elem));
218  }
219  }
220  }
221  }
222  {
223  Arcane::Integer nb_send = communicating_ghost_ranks.size() ;
224  ghost_rank_info.resize(nb_send) ;
225  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i<nb_send; ++i ){
226  Arcane::Int32SharedArray gr = ghost_group_list[i] ;
227  ghost_rank_info[i].setInfos(communicating_ghost_ranks[i],gr) ;
228  }
229  }
230  }
231 
232  IContactFamily* contactFamily = m_contactGroup.family() ;
233  ContactInternal* contactsInternal = contactFamily -> contactsInternal() ;
234  {
235  {
236  Arcane::Integer nb_recv = share_rank_info.size();
237  Arcane::Integer nb_send = ghost_rank_info.size();
238 
239  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0 ; i < nb_send ; ++i){
240  Arcane::Integer proc_id = ghost_rank_info[i].rank();
241  Arcane::Integer z = 0;
242  for( ; z<nb_recv; ++z )
243  if(share_rank_info[z].rank()==proc_id)
244  break;
245  if (z==nb_recv){
246  share_rank_info.add(ShareRankInfo(proc_id));
247  }
248  }
249 
250  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i<nb_recv; ++i ){
251  Arcane::Integer proc_id = share_rank_info[i].rank();
252  Arcane::Integer z = 0;
253  for( ; z<nb_send; ++z )
254  if(ghost_rank_info[z].rank()==proc_id)
255  break;
256  if (z==nb_send){
257  ghost_rank_info.add(GhostRankInfo(proc_id));
258  }
259  }
260 
261  if (ghost_rank_info.size()!=share_rank_info.size()){
262  throw Arcane::FatalErrorException(A_FUNCINFO, Arcane::String::format("Problem with the number of subdomain shared ({0}) and ghsots ({1})",
263  share_rank_info.size(), ghost_rank_info.size())) ;
264  }
265  std::sort(share_rank_info.begin(),share_rank_info.end());
266  std::sort(ghost_rank_info.begin(),ghost_rank_info.end());
267  }
268 
269  Arcane::Integer nb_comm_proc = ghost_rank_info.size();
270  Arcane::SharedArray<Arcane::Parallel::Request> requests;
271  {
272  Arcane::Integer current_send_index = 0;
273  Arcane::Integer current_recv_index = 0;
274  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i<nb_comm_proc*2; ++i ){
275  Arcane::Integer send_proc = nb_rank;
276  Arcane::Integer recv_proc = nb_rank;
277  if(current_send_index!=nb_comm_proc)
278  send_proc = ghost_rank_info[current_send_index].rank();
279  if(current_recv_index!=nb_comm_proc)
280  recv_proc = ghost_rank_info[current_recv_index].rank();
281  bool do_send = true;
282  if(send_proc==recv_proc){
283  if(send_proc<my_rank)
284  do_send = true;
285  else
286  do_send = false;
287  }
288  else if(send_proc<recv_proc)
289  do_send = true;
290  else
291  do_send = false;
292  if(do_send){
293  GhostRankInfo& asdi = ghost_rank_info[current_send_index];
294  asdi.resize();
295  Arcane::Int64ArrayView uids = asdi.uniqueIds();
296  Arcane::Int32ConstArrayView asdi_local_ids = asdi.localIds();
297  Arcane::Integer nb_local = asdi_local_ids.size();
298  for(Arcane::Integer z=0, zs=nb_local; z<zs; ++z ){
299  const ContactInternal elem = contactsInternal[asdi_local_ids[z]];
300  uids[z] = _form_unique_id(elem) ;
301  }
302  if (!uids.empty())
303  requests.add(m_parallelMng->send(uids,send_proc,false));
304  ++current_send_index;
305  }
306  else{
307  ShareRankInfo& asdi = share_rank_info[current_recv_index];
308  asdi.resize();
309  Arcane::Int64ArrayView contacts_unique_id = asdi.uniqueIds();
310  if(!contacts_unique_id.empty())
311  m_parallelMng -> recv(contacts_unique_id,recv_proc);
312  Arcane::Int32SharedArray contacts_local_id(contacts_unique_id.size());
313  _uniqueIdToLocalId(contacts_local_id, contacts_unique_id) ;
314  Arcane::Int32SharedArray share_group = contacts_local_id;
315  asdi.setLocalIds(share_group);
316  ++current_recv_index;
317  }
318  }
319  m_parallelMng -> waitAllRequests(requests) ;
320  }
321  }
322  _checkValid(ghost_rank_info, share_rank_info);
323 
324  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i<m_sync_list.size(); ++i ){
325  const VariableSyncInfo & sync_info = m_sync_list[i];
326  const Arcane::Integer target_rank = sync_info.targetRank();
327  m_communicating_ranks.add(target_rank);
328  ARCANE_ASSERT((sync_info.m_ghost_ids.size() == boundary_items[target_rank].size()),("Inconsistent ghost count"));
329  }
330 }
331
